audience: an audience following "the world cup final"
insight: the audience is so used to seeing "your profile picture" that they scroll past it, but "team poster style" is enough to make them stop for a second look
assetXElement: your profile picture x team poster style

generationPrompts.image: Subject is your profile picture, with visual details grafting in team poster style. Style: editorial photography, shallow depth of field, centered composition with negative space, natural light, 16:9
generationPrompts.motion: [for ChatCut] three-shot script: shot 1 establishes your profile picture in its everyday context; shot 2 introduces team poster style to create contrast; shot 3 lands the hook copy, 6 seconds total
generationPrompts.copy: Write one hook line, 20 words or fewer, built around "graft "the world cup final" onto "your profile picture", carrying forward last wave's winning traits [Winning traits from wave 1: thing asset "friend group photo" + angleType=evergreen + HOOK=GRAF. Prioritize reusing these asset shapes and angleType combinations in new variants.]", restrained tone, no exclamation marks
